benefits.description: Fat melts off quick on PSMF diet; does a short stint once a year to stay lean

side_effects.description: Sleep is terrible while on PSMF diet with Ipa/Tesa
Everything is terrible (general malaise) while on PSMF diet; attributes to diet rather than peptides

protocol_notes: Currently on PSMF diet (2% of macros from carbs, calorie deficit, predominantly protein). IGF-1 confirmed low via bloodwork at 127 ng/mL while on PSMF + Ipa/Tesa. Baseline natty IGF-1 was 230 ng/mL with no calorie deficit and 40% carbs. Believes low insulin from low-carb diet suppresses IGF-1 production in liver, reducing effectiveness of GH secretagogues. Does PSMF once a year short-term to stay lean.
